name: Marcos Fuentes Pazo
text:
El valor histórico es incalculable, y poder verlo también. Pero... Es imperdonable que tengan todos los diques secos con ocupación privada,  menos uno lleno con el museo. Por lo cual, no lo puedes ver bien. Y el puerto cubierto K3,  que es lo que mas te apetece ver,  y que uno con toda la calma lo puede ver en 30 minutos,  te obligan a ir con guía,  dando la lata en una visita de 90 minutos,  siendo 70 de los cuales por fuera de los bunkers,  porque no puedes entrar.
UN DESPROPOSITO Y UNA FALTA DE ORGANIZACION TOTAL
textTranslated:
The historical value is incalculable, and so is being able to see it. But... It is inexcusable that they have all the dry docks with private occupation, except one filled with the museum. Therefore, you cannot see it well. And the K3 covered port, which is what you most want to see, and which one can calmly see in 30 minutes, they force you to go with a guide, giving the hassle of a 90-minute visit, 70 of which are which are outside the bunkers, because you can't enter.
A MISPURPOSE AND A TOTAL LACK OF ORGANIZATION
title: Base de Sous-Marins

name: Florent Bourquin
text: Historiquement très intéressant, beaucoup de chose à apprendre. Guide très sympa.  Mais visite trop rapide de la base K3, dommage de ne pas y passer plus de temps et d'en voir plus.
textTranslated: Historically very interesting, lots to learn. Very nice guide.  But visiting the K3 base too quickly, it's a shame not to spend more time there and see more.
title: Base de Sous-Marins

name: comin anthony
text: À voir !
textTranslated: To have !
title: Base de Sous-Marins

name: R. V.
text: Really informative and interesting visit. The cost is around €5.50/adult. We saw the escape practice museum, the submarine Flore, and K3 for €35 for two. Our tour was in English and lots of fun! We spent over 3 hours here just learning. Not recommended if stairs are a problem for you.
title: Base de Sous-Marins

name: Jean-pierre Pradier
text: un incontournable à visiter avec un guide.
textTranslated: a must to visit with a guide.
title: Base de Sous-Marins

name: Richard Soper (Rich)
text: Well worth a visit.  Huge sub pens.  One million cubic meters of concrete.
title: Base de Sous-Marins

name: Noelle Geffard
text: visite très enrichissante, guide très sympathique, vraiment à faire (sans enfant en bas âge)
textTranslated: very enriching visit, very friendly guide, really worth doing (without young children)
title: Base de Sous-Marins

name: Sébastien Bogaert
text: Deux visites sont possibles : l'intérieur du sous-marin Le Flore avec audio-guide (avec un passage préalable par une exposition avec objets, vidéo et projections), puis la base sous-marine. Tout est accessible en fauteuil roulant (sauf le sous-marin).
textTranslated: Two visits are possible: the interior of the submarine Le Flore with audio guide (with a prior passage through an exhibition with objects, video and projections), then the submarine base. Everything is wheelchair accessible (except the submarine).
title: Base de Sous-Marins

name: Chloé Le Bourvellec
text: Mon père y travail
textTranslated: My father works there
title: Base de Sous-Marins

name: Gerhard Prestien
text: Meisterleistung!
textTranslated: Masterpiece!
title: Base de Sous-Marins

name: Christian Magno
text: A most informative visit through the former Keroman submarine base, originally built by the Germans during the second world war. The sub pens are impressive to see and in good condition, considering their age. The tour was in French, though they might do other languages for groups. Combine the tour with a visit to the French submarine Flore which is on display at the base.
title: Base de Sous-Marins

name: Jose Carlos T. Sanchez
text: Esto es historia de la guerra
textTranslated: This is war history
title: Base de Sous-Marins

name: Michèle Rebierre
text: Visite incontournable quand on s' intéresse à l'histoire contemporaine.
textTranslated: A must-see visit when you are interested in contemporary history.
title: Base de Sous-Marins
